ddls:
CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "medical_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "resting_blood_pressure" INTEGER /* Resting blood pressure of the patient */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level of the patient */,
  "max_heart_rate_achieved" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate achieved by the patient */,
  "st_depression" REAL /* ST depression induced by exercise relative to peak exercise */,
  "num_major_vessels" INTEGER /* Number of major vessels colored by flourosopy */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Indicator if the patient has heart disease */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the medical history was recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the medical history was updated */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of heart disease */,
  "previous_illnesses" TEXT /* Previous illnesses or conditions */,
  "medications" TEXT /* Current medications being taken */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies related to medications or other substances */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratory_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "fasting_blood_sugar" TEXT /* Fasting blood sugar level of the patient */,
  "rest_electrocardiographic" TEXT /* Resting electrocardiographic results of the patient */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "lab_tech" TEXT /* Name of the lab technician who conducted the test */,
  "test_result_date" TEXT /* Date when the test results were available */,
  "reference_values" TEXT /* Reference values for the test results */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exercise_tests" (
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "exercise_induced_angina" INTEGER /* Indicator if the patient experienced exercise-induced angina */,
  "st_slope" TEXT /* ST slope of the patient */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the exercise test in minutes */,
  "heart_rate_at_rest" INTEGER /* Heart rate at rest before the test */,
  "heart_rate_at_peak" INTEGER /* Heart rate at peak exercise */,
  "blood_pressure_at_rest" INTEGER /* Blood pressure at rest before the test */,
  "blood_pressure_at_peak" INTEGER /* Blood pressure at peak exercise */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exercise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genetic_tests" (
  "genetic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "thalassemia" TEXT /* Thalassemia result of the patient */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_facility" TEXT /* Facility where the test was conducted */,
  "test_result_date" TEXT /* Date when the test results were available */,
  "geneticist" TEXT /* Name of the geneticist who reviewed the results */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genetic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "remote_monitoring" (
  "monitoring_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the patient */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure of the patient */,
  "oxygen_level" REAL /* Oxygen level of the patient */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Activity level of the patient */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the monitoring data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monitoring_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Risk score for heart disease */,
  "predicted_outcome" TEXT /* Predicted outcome (e.g., high risk, low risk) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analytics result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment plan */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare professional who created the plan */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the plan was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)
